narrative:
Fayette Twp. township has 5,542 registered voters, with 61.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points.
